Description 2: Access control is handled by the Auth Service.

Description 3:
Auth Service

The Auth Service shall authenticate every user before granting access to protected resources.

Auth Service

Failed login attempts must be rate-limited to five per minute per account.

Auth Service

Passwords should be hashed with bcrypt.

Auth Service

Sessions will expire after 30 minutes of inactivity.

Auth Service

The Auth Service may cache public keys for up to one hour.

Auth Service

Ground Control can override a lockout for operational emergencies.

Description 2: This section describes telemetry handling across subsystems.

Description 3:
Flight Software

The Flight Software shall transmit telemetry packets to Ground Control at 1 Hz during nominal operations.

Flight Software

Telemetry packets must include a timestamp, health bits, and a CRC-32 checksum.

Flight Software

During safe mode, FSW should reduce telemetry rate to 0.1 Hz to conserve bandwidth.

Ground Control

Ground Control shall acknowledge every telemetry burst within 3 seconds.

Ground Control

Mission Control may request on-demand housekeeping packets during pass windows.

Description 2: Payload activities are coordinated between Payload Operator and Flight Software.

Description 3:
Payload Operator

The Payload Operator shall schedule imaging tasks at least 24 hours in advance.

Payload Operator

Emergency tasking requests must be routed through Ground Control.

Payload Operator

PL Op should verify target coordinates before uploading a task.

Payload Operator
